title: Emma's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Emma learns to understand and express her different emotions with help from her loving family, discovering that all feelings are okay and have their own special colors.

pages.text: Emma woke up grumpy. Her toy was broken and she felt angry red feelings swirling inside her tummy.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sits on her bed holding a broken toy, surrounded by swirling red angry emotion clouds and abstract red spiral patterns
illustration.alt: Emma looking upset with broken toy surrounded by red swirls

pages.text: Mama came in and saw Emma's red mad face. 'It's okay to feel angry,' Mama said softly. 'Let's take deep breaths together.'

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sits with her mother, both taking deep breaths as the red swirls slowly fade to softer pink colors in the background
illustration.alt: Emma and mama breathing together as red anger fades

pages.text: Later, Emma felt sad blue raindrops in her heart when Daddy had to leave for work. She wanted him to stay and play.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks waves goodbye to daddy at the door, with blue raindrop patterns and sad blue clouds floating around her
illustration.alt: Emma feeling sad as daddy leaves with blue rain emotions

pages.text: Daddy gave Emma the biggest hug. 'I feel sad too when I leave,' he said. 'But I'll be back for dinner and we can play then!'

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks getting a warm hug from daddy, the blue rain slowly transforming into gentle blue sparkles of comfort
illustration.alt: Emma hugging daddy as sad blue rain becomes gentle sparkles

pages.text: At the park, Emma felt bright yellow sunshine happiness bubbling up inside her as she played with her friends.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks laughing and playing on a swing, surrounded by bright yellow sunshine rays and golden happy bubbles floating everywhere
illustration.alt: Emma playing happily surrounded by yellow sunshine emotions

pages.text: That night, Emma told her family about all her colorful feelings. 'Every feeling is special,' said Mama. 'They help us understand ourselves.'

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sitting at dinner table with her family, with a rainbow of emotion colors swirling gently around them - red, blue, yellow, and other soft feeling colors
illustration.alt: Emma with family surrounded by rainbow of emotion colors

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color were Emma's angry feelings?
questions.explanation: Emma's angry feelings were red, like swirling red clouds in her tummy.

questions.question: How did Mama help Emma when she was angry?
questions.explanation: Mama helped Emma take deep breaths together to feel better.

questions.question: What made Emma feel sad blue feelings?
questions.explanation: Emma felt sad when Daddy had to leave for work because she wanted him to stay and play.

questions.question: What did Emma's family say about feelings?
questions.explanation: Emma's family said every feeling is special and helps us understand ourselves.
